quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rules.rule_text: When introducing dermatomyositis, pair the full condition name with the abbreviation (DM) before using the acronym to target the disease's root cause.

quotes: LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

rules.rule_text: When describing the mechanism of action metaphorically, state verbatim that LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.
